source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The piston/cylinder contains 0.1 kg water at 500\circ\text{C}, 1000 kPa. The piston has a stop at half of the original volume. The water now cools to a room temperature of 25\circ\text{C}. What is the heat transfer in the process?
